name: codex-status-bar
description: Menu bar status indicator for the Codex CLI: animated spinner, elapsed timer, and an awaiting-approval dot.

interface.shortDescription: Live Codex status in your menu bar.
interface.longDescription: Shows the Codex CLI's live status in the macOS menu bar — an animated spinner while it works, an amber dot while it awaits approval, and the elapsed turn timer. No window, no dock icon.
